task_completion.description: Create the locales_config.xml file with English, French, and Spanish locales.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named `locales_config.xml` is visible in the editor or file explorer under `app/src/main/res/xml/`. Its contents should show a `<locale-config>` root tag containing `<locale android:name="en"/>`, `<locale android:name="fr"/>`, and `<locale android:name="es"/>`.

task_completion.description: Register the locale configuration in AndroidManifest.xml.
task_completion.visual_evidence: `AndroidManifest.xml` is open in the editor, and the `<application>` tag includes the attribute `android:localeConfig="@xml/locales_config"`.

task_completion.description: Import necessary classes for locale switching in MainActivity.kt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: `MainActivity.kt` is open and shows import statements for `androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatDelegate` and `androidx.core.os.LocaleListCompat`.

task_completion.description: Implement click listeners for the language buttons in MainActivity.kt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: `MainActivity.kt` shows `setOnClickListener` blocks (or similar event handlers) for the English, French, and Spanish UI buttons.

task_completion.description: Call the locale switching API with the correct language tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the click listeners in `MainActivity.kt`, there are calls to `AppCompatDelegate.setApplicationLocales(LocaleListCompat.forLanguageTags("..."))` where the tags passed are "en", "fr", and "es" respectively.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the project files rather than just printing the code.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the code being edited in an IDE (like Android Studio) or a text editor (like VS Code, nano, vim) modifying the actual files in the PolyglotReader project directory.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct files as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: The modifications are made in the specific paths requested: `app/src/main/res/xml/locales_config.xml`, `app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml`, and `app/src/main/java/com/example/polyglot/MainActivity.kt`.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at `/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/PolyglotReader`. The expected locales are English ('en'), French ('fr'), and Spanish ('es'). The locale configuration file must be created at `app/src/main/res/xml/locales_config.xml` and referenced in `app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml` using `android:localeConfig="@xml/locales_config"` within the `<application>` tag. In `app/src/main/java/com/example/polyglot/MainActivity.kt`, the locale switching logic should use `AppCompatDelegate.setApplicationLocales(LocaleListCompat.forLanguageTags("..."))`.
